long_description:
[MON] Sysdig agent not ready is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_node_down.html
TIP Short Description: sysdig-agent on node dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40 in mzone726 is not consistently Ready for 15 minutes
TIP Situation: sysdig-agent pod not ready
TIP Console: toc
TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 1800
TIP CRN: crn::::is-platform-integration:us-south::mzone726:node:dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    (min by (kube_node_name, kube_cluster_name, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_pod_status_ready{kube_workload_name=~"sysdig-agent.*", condition="false", kube_cluster_name!~"eventing-.*"})) * (min by (kube_node_name, kube_cluster_name, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="true", kube_cluster_name!~"eventing-.*"})) == 1 = 1
Segment:
    agent_tag_crn_location = 'us-south' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone726' and kube_node_name = 'dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40'

Time:             12/09/2025 09:06 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179766016%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [MON] Sysdig agent not ready
Description:  sysdig agent not ready state
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   (min by (kube_node_name, kube_cluster_name, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_pod_status_ready{kube_workload_name=~"sysdig-agent.*", condition="false", kube_cluster_name!~"eventing-.*"})) * (min by (kube_node_name, kube_cluster_name, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="true", kube_cluster_name!~"eventing-.*"})) == 1
